description: Use this API to return an array of character values indicating the data types corresponding to a set of specified STRING values that are valid input values to any of the data retrieval routines of the branch zero sequence mutual data family (aZmutInt, aZmutReal, aZmutCplx and aZmutChar). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.12.0 and 34.0.2. ierr, types = azmuttypes(string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR strings that are valid STRING values for any of the data retrieval routines of the branch data family. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: types
return_values.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying each of which contains one of the following characters indicating the data type of the data associated with the corresponding element of STRING. (output).

error_codes.description: Position of the first element in STRING that contains a value that is not a valid STRING value for any of the data retrieval routines in the branch data family (1 < n < NSTR).
